spec.name: Mindcone
spec.summary: A spell that blocks effects using mind magic.
spec.effect_description: A spell that blocks effects using mind magic. A pentagon filter/affect recipe that channels mind discipline into raw output. It applies a cone pattern against self across long reach with immediate persistence.
